device_name: Critical Care Suite with Endotracheal Tube Positing AI algorithm
intended_use: Critical Care Suite with the Endotracheal Tube Positioning AI algorithm produces an on-screen image overlay that detects and localizes an endotracheal tube, locates the endotracheal tube tip, locates
intended_use_full: Critical Care Suite with the Endotracheal Tube Positioning AI algorithm produces an on-screen image overlay that detects and localizes an endotracheal tube, locates the endotracheal tube tip, locates the carina, and automatically calculates the vertical distance between the endotracheal tube tip and carina. This information is also transmitted to the radiologist for review.
target_condition: Endotracheal tube positioning assessment in intubated patients
ground_truth: Ground truth dataset with sufficient number of images to analyze primary and secondary endpoints
other_metrics: ETT tip to Carina distance measurement success rate: 98.51%; Carina localization success rate: 98.51%; ETT tip localization success rate: 95.24%; ETT localization success rate (DICE): 98.81%
